description_long: This object is a small potted plant featuring a sparse arrangement of thin, woody branches with a scattering of green leaves. The branches are gnarled and slightly twisted, giving the plant a somewhat wild and unpruned appearance. The pot is conical and appears to be made of a terracotta-like material, filled with dark soil visible at the top. The leaves are broad, simple, and a vibrant green, contrasting with the grayish-brown color of the branches. There are no visible flowers or fruits, and the plant seems to be in a young or possibly struggling state. The pot itself is plain, with no visible decorative elements or patterns.
description: A small, sparsely-leaved potted plant with twisted woody branches in a plain terracotta pot filled with soil. The plant has broad green leaves and a natural, unpruned look.
description_view_0: The plant is seen from the side, showing the main trunk emerging from the soil and several branches with green leaves extending outward.
description_view_1: This top-down angle highlights the arrangement of branches and leaves, as well as the conical shape of the pot and the dark soil inside.
description_view_2: A side view from the opposite direction, revealing more of the plant's branching structure and the plain surface of the pot.
description_view_3: A rear view focusing on the back branches and the full circular opening of the pot, with leaves sparsely distributed.
attribute_plant_species: bonsai (generic, possibly Ficus or similar small-leaved species)
